start.message: Namaste! Welcome to Astro Sanatani. How may I assist you on your spiritual journey today?

services.message: We offer a variety of sacred services to guide you. Which one interests you?

astrology.message: Our expert astrologers analyze your birth chart to provide deep insights into your karma and life path.

gemstones.message: Discover the perfect gemstone for your planetary alignment. Our experts recommend based on your Rashi.

vastu.message: Harmonize your living space with the ancient wisdom of Vastu Shastra for prosperity and peace.

pricing.message: Our spiritual consultations are structured to be accessible. Personalized readings start from ₹501.

support.message: Facing hurdles? Tell us what you're looking for so we can guide you.

orders.message: You can track your sacred orders in the 'My Orders' section of your personal dashboard.

payments.message: All transactions are secured with divine protection. If a payment failed, it's usually reversed within 3-5 days.
